coreIssue: This bi-weekly check-in is likely about how Carl, as a UX Lead, can manage switching costs and competing demands across CoE and AZP.
openingQuestion: What part of moving between CoE and AZP is costing you the most focus right now: priorities, ownership, or the actual context switching?
listenFor: whether he names one project as repeatedly interrupting the other
whether he can point to a specific decision, meeting, or stakeholder causing the friction
whether he hesitates to rank CoE versus AZP for the next two weeks
avoid: do not treat this as a personal resilience problem before testing priority and ownership clarity
do not ask him to keep both projects equally moving if the tradeoffs are not explicit
goodOutcome: You and Carl have agreed which project gets lead-level priority for the next two weeks and what ownership boundary or tradeoff that implies across the other stream.
suggestedAction: Before the 1:1, pick one recent example where Carl had to switch between CoE and AZP so you can ground the conversation in a real tradeoff.
